DEHCRevFrenchRoyalArmy.name: French Royal Army
DEHCRevFrenchRoyalArmy.desc: Enables Musketeers and Halberdiers to benefit from Combat promotions to receive extra hitpoints and damage for each defeated enemy military unit.

RvltModHCMercsMamelukes.name: Hire Mamelukes
RvltModHCMercsMamelukes.desc: Enables Mamelukes to be hired as mercenaries.
